kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8080/api/push-notifications/subscribe path_url=/api/push-notifications/subscribe headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW05bDhhZHEwMDNidmoyZ2hiaWs3emVnIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImVtYWlsIjoidGVzdDExQGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc0ODk3MSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzUyNTcxfQ.F00nN9SHof48UwlNotMGk7NLcJBpJxeTU2bjfxJJEAg', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '160'} body=b'{"subscription": {"endpoint": "https://fcm.googleapis.com/fcm/send/fake", "expirationTime": null, "keys": {"p256dh": "BGM_fake_key", "auth": "rmwk_fake_auth"}}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8080/api/push-notifications/send path_url=/api/push-notifications/send headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW05MzRrODEwMDBmdmoyZ3c1aDVnbXJnIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiZW1haWwiOiJ0ZXN0ZXIyQGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1MDk2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzU0NTYwfQ.9WSurdGjl9WliCHvtyifEwK_Z6sGit1NkYssrPtnLRw', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '101'} body=b'{"targetUserId": "cmm934k81000fvj2gw5h5gmrg", "title": "Test Title", "body": "Test Body", "url": "/"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
